The split pole magnetic spectrometer with an
ANG-CM angles compiled are those calculated
by D.Bucurescu from the corresponding lab. angles
mentioned in the source article (20 to 120 degree in
step of 5 degree for (p,p`) and 20 to 75 degree in step
